name: Merging two same-level books produces one book of the next level
description: Two level-1 books tap-merged become a single level-2 book and the inventory count shrinks by one.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game and wait for the HUD
Click the SUMMON button twice so at least two LV 1 books exist in the inventory grid
Tap the first inventory book to select it, then tap the second book of the same level
Verify a single book labeled LV 2 now exists where the merge happened
Verify the total number of filled inventory cells decreased by one
